item.title: offtheball: John Duggan reposteó Off The Ball @offtheball · 35min 'LIV has got no soul, it's got no meaning, it's got no audience!'
item.description:
John Duggan reposteó Off The Ball @offtheball · 35min 'LIV has got no soul, it's got no meaning, it's got no audience!'
'You can't buy an audience! You can buy players, but you can't buy an audience!'
With the reports emerging that LIV Golf may be on it's last legs, @JohnDugganSport sums up exactly why he feels it has Mostrar más 1 1 2 mil

item.title: kinneston: Racing TV reposteó Nick Alexander @kinneston · 3h And that was that, farewell and good luck to Elvis Mail - - you’ve bee
item.description: Racing TV reposteó Nick Alexander @kinneston · 3h And that was that, farewell and good luck to Elvis Mail - - you’ve been an absolute star 20 29 492 16 mil
